summary: Completed testing of iteration 142 features: Forum categories/edit/pin/comments, Balance Audit Trail, Admin transaction correction/deletion, Simulate Actions restriction. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for all features.

issues: Missing DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility (console warnings)

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding DialogTitle to modal dialogs for accessibility compliance (Radix UI warnings in console)
seed_data_creation: Created test forum posts and comments for testing edit/delete/pin operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests for iteration 142 features created in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_142_features.py. All forum endpoints (categories, user search, post edit/pin, comment edit/delete) working. Transaction correction/deletion endpoints working. Simulate Actions dropdown visible only to Master Admin with VSD, Simulate Error, Export Debug Data options.

forum_features.GET /api/forum/categories: PASS - Returns 4 default categories (general, trading, technical, announcements)
forum_features.POST /api/forum/posts: PASS - Creates post with category field
forum_features.PUT /api/forum/posts/{id}: PASS - Edits post (title/content/category), sets edited flag
forum_features.PUT /api/forum/comments/{id}: PASS - Edits comment content, sets edited flag

transaction_features.GET /api/profit/my-recent-transactions: PASS - Returns last 2 editable transactions with editable flag
transaction_features.PUT /api/admin/transactions/{id}/correct: PASS - Admin can correct transaction amount

frontend_features.Forum category filter buttons: PASS - All 5 buttons visible (All, General, Trading, Technical, Announcements)
frontend_features.Forum post edit/delete/pin buttons: PASS - Edit, Delete, Pin buttons visible for admin
frontend_features.Forum comment edit/delete buttons: PASS - Edit and Delete buttons visible on comments
frontend_features.Balance Audit Trail: PASS - Visible on Profit Tracker with day-by-day timeline
frontend_features.Admin Transactions Correct/Delete: PASS - Edit and Delete icons visible per row, Corrected badge shown
